hero.headline: Breathe easier in minutes with botanical nasal support
hero.subheadline: A gentle plant-based spray to help relieve nasal discomfort and promote clearer breathing.

problem.title: Is nasal discomfort holding you back?
problem.subtitle: Everyday triggers that disrupt your breathing, sleep, and focus.

congestion.title: Nasal Congestion
congestion.desc: Blocked passages that make every breath feel heavy and strained.

runnyNose.title: Runny Nose
runnyNose.desc: Constant dripping that breaks your focus and interrupts your day.

allergies.title: Seasonal Allergies
allergies.desc: Pollen and dust that leave your nose irritated and inflamed.

nightBreathing.title: Nighttime Breathing
nightBreathing.desc: Poor nasal airflow that ruins your sleep and leaves you tired.

product.title: A botanical spray that works with your body
product.subtitle: ClearNose Botanical Spray is a plant-based nasal spray designed for daily nasal hygiene and comfort.
product.description: Formulated with carefully selected botanical ingredients, ClearNose helps relieve nasal discomfort, supports nasal comfort, and promotes easier breathing — without harsh chemicals or dependency.

natural.title: Plant-Based Formula
natural.desc: Made with botanical extracts, free from harsh chemicals.

gentle.title: Gentle & Soothing
gentle.desc: Helps relieve nasal discomfort without irritation.

daily.title: Daily Use Friendly
daily.desc: Supports ongoing nasal comfort and hygiene.

breathing.title: Promotes Easier Breathing
breathing.desc: Helps clear the way for more comfortable breathing.

howToUse.title: Three steps to clearer breathing
howToUse.subtitle: Easy to integrate into your daily nasal care routine.

1.title: Spray
1.desc: Gently insert the nozzle and spray once or twice into each nostril.

2.title: Wait
2.desc: Stay still for a few minutes to let the botanicals take effect.

3.title: Rinse
3.desc: If needed, gently blow or rinse your nose to clear loosened mucus.

ingredients.title: Botanical ingredients you can trust
ingredients.subtitle: A simple, plant-based formula designed for nasal comfort.
ingredients.note: Full ingredient list available on product packaging. Demo content shown below.

reviews.title: What our users are saying
reviews.subtitle: Demo testimonials based on typical user experiences.

1.name: Sarah M.
1.text: ClearNose became part of my morning routine. It helps relieve congestion gently and I love that it's plant-based.

2.name: James L.
2.text: I use it during allergy season and it really supports my nasal comfort. No harsh feeling at all.

3.name: Emma R.
3.text: Gentle and easy to use. Helps me breathe easier at night so I sleep much better.

4.name: David K.
4.text: Finally a natural option that works for daily nasal hygiene. The botanical scent is refreshing.

5.name: Lily T.
5.text: I bought the 3-bottle bundle for my family. Everyone finds it soothing and pleasant to use.

6.name: Michael B.
6.text: Promotes easier breathing without the stinging of chemical sprays. Will repurchase.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

1.question: What is ClearNose Botanical Spray?
1.answer: ClearNose is a plant-based nasal spray designed to support nasal comfort and hygiene. It is not a medical product and is not intended to diagnose or treat diseases.

2.question: How fast does it work?
2.answer: Most users report feeling the soothing botanical effects within a few minutes of application. Individual experiences may vary.

3.question: Is it safe for daily use?
3.answer: Yes. ClearNose is formulated with gentle botanical ingredients suitable for daily nasal care routines. If you experience any discomfort, discontinue use and consult a healthcare professional.

4.question: Can children use it?
4.answer: ClearNose is intended for adults. For children, please consult a pediatrician before use.

single.name: Single Bottle

footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: ClearNose Botanical Spray is not a medical product and is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Consult a healthcare professional before use if you are pregnant, nursing, or have a medical condition.
